---
title: "Long Paths and 8.3 Filename Troubleshooting"
format: gfm
execute:
  echo: true
  output: true
  warning: true
  message: true
---

```{r setup}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

## Legacy diagnostic intent

The legacy project carried lengthy troubleshooting comments about Windows long paths, 8.3 short filenames, and reader fallbacks.  The current production implementation is in `R/io/read_long_paths.R`; this analysis note keeps the explanatory material out of production code and renders the current helper implementation directly.

```{r long-path-functions}
analysis_render_source_file("R/io/read_long_paths.R", language = "r")
```
